name: skillforge
description: A private-by-default evidence workspace for outcome-driven builders

scripts.dev: concurrently --names client,server --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@skillforge/client && npm run typecheck --workspace=@skillforge/server
